---
ID: US-OLV-043
Title: Use custom pickers
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Port Accounts UX and complete module hub shell

As a operator
I want searchable custom pickers instead of native selects
So that forms stay consistent and keyboard-friendly

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Visible dropdowns use CustomPicker or Picker components.
- [ ] Pickers support search where configured.
- [ ] Escape/outside click closes open menus.
- [ ] Multi-select choices can be toggled without losing state.

Notes: Native select replacement was a repeated migration theme.
---
